channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Knitting enthusiasts from around the country recently met for yarn fest
item.description: People who love to knit held a convention recently where they showed off their love for yarn and fiber arts.
item.content:encoded: People who love to knit held a convention recently where they showed off their love for yarn and fiber arts.
item.dc:creator: Leslie E. Thompson

item.title: A slew of new Bigfoot sightings, on-screen and off-Broadway
item.description: Bigfoot is popping up everywhere — in low-budget horror films, in festivals around the country, and even in a critically acclaimed musical.
item.content:encoded:
Bigfoot is popping up everywhere — in low-budget horror films, in festivals around the country, and even in a critically acclaimed musical.

(Image credit: Marc J. Franklin)
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby

item.title: Family influencers make the lifestyle look good. But kids pay the price, new book says
item.description: What does it mean to monetize your offspring? To turn their childhood into content? In Like, Follow, Subscribe Fortesa Latifi explores what drives parents to become family influencers.
item.content:encoded: What does it mean to monetize your offspring? To turn their childhood into content? In Like, Follow, Subscribe Fortesa Latifi explores what drives parents to become family influencers.
item.dc:creator: Ilana Masad

item.title: A filmmaker pieces together her brother's troubled past in 'Blue Heron'
item.description: Sophy Romvari's debut feature is a moving, semi-autobiographical account of a family doing everything they can to try to help their teen son.
item.content:encoded:
Sophy Romvari's debut feature is a moving, semi-autobiographical account of a family doing everything they can to try to help their teen son.

(Image credit: Janus Films)
item.dc:creator: Teresa Xie

item.title: Priceless 2,500-year-old golden helmet returned to Romania after Dutch museum raid
item.description: The ornate Cotofenesti helmet, which was stolen in January 2025 while on loan to a Dutch museum, was recovered last month.
item.content:encoded:
The ornate Cotofenesti helmet, which was stolen in January 2025 while on loan to a Dutch museum, was recovered last month.

(Image credit: Andreea Alexandru)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Oscar Isaac struggled with 'Beef.' So he turned to 'Frankenstein' for help
item.description: In Season 2 of Beef, Isaac plays Josh, a country club manager whose life is unravelling. He got into character by imagining how Victor Frankenstein would feel trapped inside Josh's "small life."
item.content:encoded:
In Season 2 of Beef, Isaac plays Josh, a country club manager whose life is unravelling. He got into character by imagining how Victor Frankenstein would feel trapped inside Josh's "small life."

(Image credit: Emma McIntyre)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: Want to lighten your mental load? First, let go of these gender myths
item.description: "Men can't see the mess." "Women are better at chores." These myths position women to take on more emotional thinking, says researcher Leah Ruppanner. She shares what works to reclaim your headspace.
item.content:encoded:
Drained: Reduce Your Mental Load to Do Less and Be More, busts pervasive cultural myths that keep a woman's mental load heavy.'/>

"Men can't see the mess." "Women are better at chores." These myths position women to take on more emotional thinking, says researcher Leah Ruppanner. She shares what works to reclaim your headspace.

(Image credit: Malte Mueller/Getty, Composite by NPR)
item.dc:creator: Andee Tagle

item.title: A young mom turns to OnlyFans to make ends meet in 'Margo's Got Money Troubles'
item.description: This TV adaptation of Rufi Thorpe's 2024 novel is a wild ride from start to finish. Its all-star cast includes Elle Fanning, Michelle Pfeiffer, Nick Offerman and Nicole Kidman.
item.content:encoded:
'/>

This TV adaptation of Rufi Thorpe's 2024 novel is a wild ride from start to finish. Its all-star cast includes Elle Fanning, Michelle Pfeiffer, Nick Offerman and Nicole Kidman.
item.dc:creator: David Bianculli

item.title: Unwanted guns become tools and jewelry
item.description: A group in North Carolina helps people turn unwanted guns into tools and jewelry. For some, it's a healing process.
item.content:encoded: A group in North Carolina helps people turn unwanted guns into tools and jewelry. For some, it's a healing process.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Williams

item.title: A 15-year-old shoplifter changed his course when another teen whispered a message
item.description: As a teenager, Everett Miller went through a rough time and started shoplifting. He recalls how a girl's whispered message kept him from making a terrible mistake.
item.content:encoded: As a teenager, Everett Miller went through a rough time and started shoplifting. He recalls how a girl's whispered message kept him from making a terrible mistake.
